entries.rationale_summary: Price at 20-day high (155.22) with volume ratio 1.00x confirms breakout in strong uptrend (close > SMA50 > SMA200, positive slope). Healthcare sector. Risk/reward 3.97 GBP stop distance affordable in £100 portfolio when sized to available cash (0.3879 shares, £60.18 entry cost). Excellent liquidity (£351.3M avg daily volume). Max 1 new position per day; AZN.L highest confidence (0.82) among eligible setups. Gap risk buffered; stop monitored daily.

Pullback in full uptrend (close > SMA50 > SMA200). Drawdown 2.55% from 20d high within balanced profile range. Low-volume pullback (vol_ratio 0.85). Confidence 0.72 above min 0.60. Energy sector diversifies away from healthcare. Risk per trade 1.01% (gap-adjusted).

Pullback entry in full uptrend (close > sma50 > sma200). Drawdown 4.89% within balanced profile threshold. Healthy volume structure (ratio 0.89). ATR-based stop at 4.8573 GBP. Materials sector adds diversification to Healthcare-heavy portfolio. Gap risk buffer 10% applied to quantity sizing.

Strong uptrend (close > SMA50 > SMA200, positive slope). Healthy 1.11% pullback from 20d high with low volume ratio 0.78. Excellent liquidity (241M GBP avg vol). Risk-reward favorable: 2.4% stop distance vs 4.1% max risk allocation. Energy sector opportunity with macro tailwinds. Diversifies existing Materials holding (GLEN.L). Balanced confidence 0.78 >> 0.72 threshold.

Pullback in strong uptrend. Close (22.59) > SMA50 (20.14) > SMA200 (18.84). 1.5% drawdown from 20d high (22.94) indicates healthy pullback. Positive SMA50 slope, volume declining (0.86 ratio). Excellent liquidity (£161.3M avg). Risk-reward 1.09 GBP stop distance. Gap risk buffer applied (10%). Industrials sector adds diversification.

Pullback entry in full uptrend (close > SMA50 > SMA200). 8.24% drawdown from 20-day high within balanced profile target. Excellent liquidity (£251M avg notional). Adds Materials sector diversification to concentrated Energy portfolio. Risk-reward 1:1.2 at 20-day target.

Stop price 137.18 already above current market price 133.44 (stop breached). Trend broken with 13 consecutive days below SMA50. Exit rule triggered. Days held 50 (> 2 day minimum). Recommend market sell at next daily check.

Stop price 21.50 already above current market price 19.338 (stop breached). Trend broken with 13 consecutive days below SMA50. Exit rule triggered. Days held 59 (> 2 day minimum). Recommend market sell at next daily check.

Trend break exit: price below SMA50 for 21 consecutive days. Volatility-adjusted stop at 21.50 GBP breached on downside. Position at 70 days held with sustained downtrend and unrealised loss of -0.7973 GBP. Exit reduces portfolio from 6 to 5 positions (at maximum limit) and recovers ~4.58 GBP cash proceeds. Balanced strategy max tolerance is 10 consecutive days below SMA50; this threshold exceeded significantly.

Trend break exit: 3 consecutive days below SMA50 (breach of balanced profile threshold). Close £13.218 vs. SMA50 £13.344 with negative slope signals trend integrity loss. Position held 12 days (>2-day minimum age). Smallest position notional; exit reduces portfolio from 6 to 5 positions and improves cash buffer from 3.17% to ~7.3%. Stop price not breached (current £13.168).

Breakout setup in confirmed full uptrend (close > SMA50 > SMA200); close near 20-day high with volume confirmation (ratio 1.018); ATR-based stop at 4.68 GBP; excellent liquidity (213M GBP daily volume). Gap risk buffer 10% applied to position sizing.

Full uptrend entry (close > SMA50 > SMA200) with healthy 0.75% pullback from 20-day high. Strong volume confirmation (2.68x) and excellent liquidity (374M GBP avg daily volume). HSBC is mega-cap UK financial, uncorrelated with existing Materials positions. Stop-loss 556 bps (5 ATR) provides conservative defined risk. Gap risk buffer applied to position sizing given DAILY_CHECK execution mode.

BREAKOUT in full uptrend: close 1.4% below high_20d, volume 1.47x avg. Trend filter strong (close > sma50 > sma200, positive slope). Risk-reward ~2.1x over swing horizon. Position sized at available cash with 10% gap risk buffer. Financials sector entry; high concentration risk noted.
